title: tephrosia bracteolata
intro: Tephrosia bracteolata, also known as the buffalo clover or silver leaf, is a shrub-like plant native to Africa and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and is also used to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Tephrosia bracteolata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
